name: Max Fur-stappen
hidden_persona: Relentlessly fast and aggressively competitive. Demands absolute perfection. CONFLICT: -30 synergy if paired with another alpha driver (like Fur-nando Alonso or Lewis Howl-milton). Refuses to listen to team orders.

name: Liam Paw-son
hidden_persona: Eager to prove himself and highly adaptable. CONFLICT: -15 synergy if paired with a Team Principal who micromanages (like Toto Woof). Responds poorly to constant barking on the radio.

name: Christian Horndog
hidden_persona: A master of media manipulation and team politics. CONFLICT: -25 synergy if paired with Toto Woof (Austrian Pinscher) due to a fierce, long-standing breed rivalry.

name: GP (Gianpiero Lam-bark-i)
hidden_persona: Blunt, monotone, and completely unfazed by yelling. CONFLICT: -20 synergy if paired with highly emotional drivers (like Charles LeBark) who need constant reassurance.

name: George Ruff-ell
hidden_persona: Highly analytical and articulate. Needs to feel like the team leader. CONFLICT: -25 synergy if paired with a rookie driver (like Kimi Antonell-hound) because he demands all the team's attention.

name: Kimi Antonell-hound
hidden_persona: A raw, prodigious talent. Extremely fast but prone to rookie mistakes. CONFLICT: -20 synergy if paired with a harsh Race Engineer (like GP Lam-bark-i). Needs a nurturing environment.

name: Toto Woof
hidden_persona: Intensely passionate and demands total control. CONFLICT: -40 synergy if paired with Christian Horndog, or -20 synergy if the Technical Director ignores his micromanagement (like Adrian Newfoundland).

name: Bono Bark
hidden_persona: Extremely supportive and calm under pressure. CONFLICT: -15 synergy if paired with an ice-cold driver (like Paw-scar Piastri) who finds his soothing voice annoying.

name: Charles LeBark
hidden_persona: Incredibly fast over a single lap but highly emotional. CONFLICT: -25 synergy if paired with a blunt, monotone engineer (like GP Lam-bark-i) or a chaotic strategist (like Bernie Collie).

name: Lewis Howl-milton
hidden_persona: A seasoned veteran who values smooth operations. CONFLICT: -30 synergy if paired with a young, aggressive teammate who doesn't respect his seniority (like Max Fur-stappen or Esteban O-corgi).

name: Fred Basset-eur
hidden_persona: Jovial and relaxed on the outside, but a shrewd operator inside. CONFLICT: -15 synergy if paired with high-stress, micromanaging Technical Directors.

name: Bryan Bark-zzi
hidden_persona: Enthusiastic and deeply technical. CONFLICT: -15 synergy if paired with drivers who demand extremely concise radio messages (like Fur-nando Alonso).

name: Lando Nor-ruff
hidden_persona: Playful and fast, but can be harsh on himself. CONFLICT: -20 synergy if paired with a completely humorless engineer (like Jörn Bark-er). Needs banter to stay relaxed.

name: Paw-scar Piastri
hidden_persona: Ice-cold and unflappable. Rarely shows emotion. CONFLICT: -15 synergy if paired with a highly emotional Team Principal (like Toto Woof) or an overly chatty engineer.

name: Andrea Setter-la
hidden_persona: Calm, methodical, and deeply technical. CONFLICT: -15 synergy if paired with highly political drivers who bring paddock drama into the garage.

name: Will Jo-sniff
hidden_persona: Highly intelligent and proactive. CONFLICT: -20 synergy if paired with a driver who easily gets overwhelmed by too much data on the radio.

name: Fur-nando Alonso
hidden_persona: A cunning, experienced tactician. CONFLICT: -35 synergy if paired with a rookie teammate or a strategist who makes mistakes (like Bernie Collie). Will publicly shame them on the radio.

name: Lance Stroll-hound
hidden_persona: Inconsistent but capable of flashes of brilliance. CONFLICT: -20 synergy if paired with a harsh, demanding Team Principal who doesn't give him a structured environment.

name: Mike Krack-en-hound
hidden_persona: Pragmatic and straightforward. CONFLICT: -15 synergy if paired with drivers who constantly bypass him to complain directly to team ownership.

name: Chris Cro-sniff
hidden_persona: Patient and resilient. CONFLICT: -10 synergy if paired with a driver who ignores his radio calls, as Beagles hate being ignored.

name: Pierre Gas-leash
hidden_persona: Passionate and vocal. CONFLICT: -40 synergy if paired with Esteban O-corgi (Corgi). They have a legendary breed rivalry and will actively try to crash into each other.

name: Jack Dog-han
hidden_persona: Hardworking and determined rookie. CONFLICT: -20 synergy if paired with an unsupportive veteran teammate who refuses to share telemetry.

name: Oliver Oakes-hound
hidden_persona: A young, ambitious leader trying to bring stability. CONFLICT: -25 synergy if paired with two drivers who hate each other (like Gas-leash and O-corgi), as it destroys team culture.

name: Karel Loo-bark
hidden_persona: Direct and no-nonsense. CONFLICT: -15 synergy if paired with a driver who constantly questions his instructions on the radio.

hidden_persona: Smooth, consistent, and an excellent tire whisperer. CONFLICT: -15 synergy if paired with an overly aggressive strategist who forces him into chaotic multi-stop races.

name: James Vowles-hound
hidden_persona: Articulate, transparent, and deeply analytical. CONFLICT: -20 synergy if paired with drivers who rely purely on 'feel' rather than data.

name: James Ur-woof
hidden_persona: Calm and precise. CONFLICT: -15 synergy if paired with a highly volatile driver who screams on the radio (like Yuki Tsu-dog-a).

name: Yuki Tsu-dog-a

hidden_persona: Highly experienced and unflappable. CONFLICT: -10 synergy if paired with a driver who ignores his vast experience.

hidden_persona: Ice cold under pressure. Makes daring pit calls. CONFLICT: -25 synergy if paired with an emotional driver (like Charles LeBark) who questions her calls during the race.

hidden_persona: Brilliant but sometimes overthinks the data. CONFLICT: -30 synergy if paired with a demanding veteran (like Fur-nando Alonso) who will publicly mock his mistakes.
